title: Harm
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image= |name=Harm |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Still at one hundred percent, sir."''
''"Good. Begin a step-back in random percentages of power—randomize from seven. When you hit seventy-five percent, cut to fifty. When their salvos slacken, go down to twenty, then five, then zero.|Harm, reporting shield levels to Evir Derricote|}} '''Harm''' was an [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Technician/Legends|technician]] who monitored [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shielding]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] during the [[First Battle of Borleias]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], in which the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] sought to capture Borleias as a base for an eventual [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|assault]] on the planet [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. During the course of the battle, Harm reported that the bases [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] were still at one hundred percent, despite being [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|bombarded]] by the New Republic [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial I-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]''. At this point, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Evir Derricote]], [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] base on Borleias, ordered him to begin stepping the power back in random amounts. As Derricote had anticipated, the ''Emancipator'' scaled back the bombardment of the base as soon as the shields dropped, allowing Derricote's forces to launch a successful counterattack. ==Behind the scenes== Harm first appeared in the [[1996]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]]. ==Appearances== *''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Rogue Squadron (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Harm }} [[Category:Galactic Empire military personnel]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
